name: Puree of Asparagus Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Snap off the lower ends of asparagus where they easily break and bend. Chop these pieces and add them to the stock ingredients with 8 cups water.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil and simmer for 20-25 minutes, then strain.
3. Cut off the very tips of the asparagus and set aside. Chop the middle pieces and set aside.
4. In a separate pan, sauté leeks, onions, and shallots in olive oil over medium heat for 5 minutes, stirring often.
5. Add the chopped middle pieces of asparagus, salt, pepper, parsley, and stock to the pan. Simmer for 10 minutes or until asparagus is tender.
6. Blend the soup with miso using a fine screen or food mill.
7. Blend the tofu and add it to the soup.
8. In another pot, bring a few cups of water to a boil with a little salt. Cook the asparagus tips until crisp-tender and strain them in a colander.
9. Garnish the soup with the cooked asparagus tips. Serves 6-8.
